HERO.DESC: From invoice creation to DGI transmission, everything is automated, secure, and compliant.

WORKFLOW.DESC: A fully digital process. Your TEIF 2026 compliance is secured at every step.

STEP1.TITLE: Signup & upload
STEP1.DESC: Create your company space and upload your legal documents: tax ID, RNE and manager ID.

STEP2.TITLE: KYC validation
STEP2.DESC: Your file is reviewed automatically and scored against identity and compliance rules.

STEP3.TITLE: Invoice creation
STEP3.DESC: Create invoices in a guided interface where required tax data is already framed correctly.

STEP4.TITLE: UBL 2.1 generation
STEP4.DESC: The invoice is converted to the official format, electronically signed, and secured with a SHA-256 fingerprint.

STEP5.TITLE: DGI transmission
STEP5.DESC: Direct delivery to the DGI official API with receipt acknowledgment and full traceability.

FEATURES.DESC: Six essential features built for Tunisian companies: native DGI compliance, KYC validation, electronic signature, and a complete audit trail.

KYC.TITLE: Company KYC validation
KYC.DESC: Document upload, automatic identity verification, and file validation in line with DGI requirements.
KYC.DETAIL: The KYC module collects and automatically verifies legal documents: tax ID, RNE registry, and the manager's ID. Each file is scored and validated before any invoice can be issued.

SCORE.TITLE: Automatic compliance score
SCORE.DESC: A TEIF score is calculated in real time for every invoice, with instant alerts when a regulatory gap appears.
SCORE.DETAIL: A rules engine reviews every invoice against TEIF 2026 criteria: format, mandatory data, VAT, and signature. The score is updated automatically and stored in the audit trail.

UBL.TITLE: UBL 2.1 generation
UBL.DESC: Automatic invoice generation in UBL 2.1, compliant with DGI Tunisia, with no manual intervention.
UBL.DETAIL: The generation engine produces UBL 2.1 XML documents compliant with the official DGI Tunisia schemas. Data is syntactically and semantically validated before every transmission.

API.TITLE: DGI transmission (API)
API.DESC: Direct connection to the official DGI Tunisia API, with automatic acknowledgments and full traceability.
API.DETAIL: Each invoice is sent through the official DGI Tunisia API with a timestamped acknowledgment. In case of error, the platform retries automatically and alerts the responsible user.

SIGNATURE.TITLE: Electronic signature
SIGNATURE.DESC: Qualified signature with a SHA-256 cryptographic fingerprint. Every invoice remains tamper-proof and auditable.
SIGNATURE.DETAIL: Each invoice is electronically signed through a SHA-256 hashing process. The signature guarantees document integrity and authenticity for the DGI.

AUDIT.TITLE: Complete audit trail
AUDIT.DESC: A log of creation, validation, transmission, and archiving steps, exportable for tax audits.
AUDIT.DETAIL: Every action on an invoice is timestamped and stored in an immutable log. The audit trail can be exported as PDF or CSV to support fiscal controls.

COMPLIANCE.DESC: TunisFlow was designed from day one to meet TEIF 2026 and DGI Tunisia requirements. Every feature is certified and auditable.

PAPERLESS.TITLE: Replaces paper filing
PAPERLESS.DESC: No more trips to the tax office. Everything is sent electronically to the DGI with a receipt acknowledgment.

AUTOMATION.TITLE: Automated validation
AUTOMATION.DESC: Every invoice is validated automatically against TEIF 2026 rules. Fewer human errors, fewer avoidable rejections.

SCORE.TITLE: Real-time compliance score
SCORE.DESC: A TEIF compliance score is calculated continuously for every invoice, so you always know where you stand.

SME.TITLE: Tunisian SMEs
SME.DESC: The ideal solution for small and medium-sized companies subject to TEIF 2026.
POINTS: Intuitive interface with no training required

ACCOUNTANTS.TITLE: Accountants
ACCOUNTANTS.DESC: Manage several client companies from a single multi-entity workspace.

ENTERPRISE.TITLE: Large enterprises
ENTERPRISE.DESC: A scalable architecture for large organizations with high invoicing volumes.

SECURITY.DESC: Every tax data point is encrypted, traced, and archived according to Tunisian legal requirements and EY standards. Zero unauthorized access.

AES.TITLE: AES-256 encryption
AES.DESC: All tax data is encrypted at rest and in transit with AES-256.

AUDIT.TITLE: Immutable audit log
AUDIT.DESC: Every action is traced and timestamped in an exportable log for fiscal review.

HOSTING.TITLE: Hosted in Tunisia
HOSTING.DESC: Data is hosted on certified servers located in Tunisia, in line with local regulations.

ARCHIVE.TITLE: 10-year archiving
ARCHIVE.DESC: Invoices are legally retained for at least 10 years in compliance with DGI Tunisia obligations.

CTA_SECTION.TITLE: Ready to go paperless?
CTA_SECTION.DESC: Request your company space in less than 5 minutes. 100% digital onboarding, with no travel and no paper file.

TIME.TITLE: Massive time savings
TIME.DESC: Fewer errors and shorter tax processing delays

FOOTER.SUBTITLE: Certified electronic invoicing for Tunisia
FOOTER.TAGLINE: The reference platform for TEIF 2026 compliant electronic invoicing in Tunisia. Built according to EY standards.
FOOTER.LEGAL: © {{year}} TunisFlow. All rights reserved. TEIF 2026 · DGI Tunisia · UBL 2.1
